docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,495.00 FILED BY ELITE SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNAN NAOMI R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
